name: Beechworth Granite Classic 115km
notes: Nutrition: big breakfast 2hrs before. Gel every 45 min. Eat at every stop. Carry 6-8 gels. Electrolyte every hour. Enjoy it.
Post-race walk — HR under 120. Skip if still wrecked — take another off day
Skip if still sore — swap for off day
First run back. Stop immediately if anything feels off — swap for walk if needed
Easy flush walk or rest if previous run flagged anything
Second easy run — only if Apr 23 felt fine
Club run — enforce HR cap even at club
Deload long run — keep it easy
Longest threshold session of the block
Baby due ~Jun 15 — may be last structured session
Family first if needed — skip if required
Flex from here if baby arrives

name: Baby Due — Newborn MED Phase
notes: Train when you can. Sleep beats training. Come back when ready.
